output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    // Create a buffer to hold the serialized data
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    
    // Create a buffer adaptor for the vector
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    
    // Create a binary stream using the adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);
    
    // Write the header using operator<<
    stream << packet.header;
    
    // Write the data string (automatically uses prefixed format)
    stream << packet.data;
    
    // Write 16 bytes of padding (0x00) using fill<16>()
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);
    
    // Write the footer using operator<<
    stream << packet.footer;
    
    // Return the buffer containing the serialized data
    return buffer;
}
```</answer>
